meaning: n.溜冰场,冰球场,室内溜冰场vi.溜冰
examples: The other skaters were ordered off the rink.
There is an ice skating rink which is fun for everybody.
They turn this entire area in the center here to an ice skating rink.
The Capitals practiced at their rink on Saturday before heading back to New York.
Several major changes included the removal of the ice-skating rink and the creation of an atrium.
